hooks.description: Auto-check and sync OctoberCMS documentation if outdated, or prompt for setup
hooks.command: if [ -f .claude/octobercms-config.json ]; then python3 "$(dirname "$0")/../scripts/auto_sync.py" 2>/dev/null || true; else echo '⚠️  OctoberCMS plugin installed but not configured. Run /setup to get started.'; fi
